free_text: Measurement of the 235U(n,f) cross section relative
to the 6Li(n,t) and 10B(n,a) standards from thermal
to 170 keV neutron energy range at nTOF
High resolution data from thermal to 10 keV
Description of facility, neutron production, moderator
Six samples - two for each target material and six Si
detectors each one facing one sample
LiF, 47 mm x 47 mm, 1.97+/-0.03 um thick (nominal),
B4C, 70 mm x 70 mm, 0.080+/-0.005 um thick (nominal),
50 mm x 50 mm active area and 200 um thick with
a 0.5 um Al dead layer on top
On. High resolution data added in 013-014.
in the 7.8-11 eV cross section integral (0.37%)
